name: OAuth Consent - App Access Request
subject: Action required: New app access request for your account
html:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

An application named "WorkFlow Assistant" is requesting access to your account.

  • Read your email
  • Send email on your behalf
  • Read your contacts

If you did not initiate this, review and deny the request within 24 hours.

Review app access

Thanks,
Security Operations
